title: TOPWAY Wall Anchor Setting Tool Kit 52PCs with Measuring Tape and Zinc Plated Metal Plasterboard Cavity Molly Bolt Hollow Wall Fixings Anchors Screws Assortment Set
features: Ergonomic design, anti-slip thick handle, simple operation.
Features 14mm maximum working stroke and 16 times the maximum arm force multiple.
Specialist fixing gun for specific use when installing cavity wall anchors in to plasterboard.
Include: Measuring Tape (1PC), M4x38mm(10PCs), M4x46mm(10PCs), M5x37mm(10PCs), M5x52mm(10PCs), M6x37mm(10PCs) zinc plated carbon steel cavity insert anchors.
description: Features: This TOPWAY cavity wall anchor fixing tool is a specialist fixing gun for specific use when installing cavity wall anchors in to plasterboard. It has a tough metal construction for durability, with an ergonomic grip for comfort and to ease installation. Used for cavity anchor plasterboard fixing application, widely used in drywall, hollow block, plaster, tile, perfect for hanging curtain rods, lamps, photo frames, coat racks, power switches. Specifications: Material: Metal Total Length: 175mm Unit Weight: 430g Working Stroke: 14mm 16 times the maximum arm force multiple Package Including: 1 x Rivet Gun 1 x Measuring Tape 50 x Hollow Wall Anchors 1 x Transparent Plastic Box
